scenarios.name: CV Intake Pipeline v2
scenarios.file_size_filter_note: Module 3 filter rejects files >400K chars (~100K tokens). Prevents context window errors and excessive TPM consumption.

last_success.notes: First success after OpenAI tier upgrade. Processed the original 66K token CV.

queue_blockers.fix: Upgrade to OpenAI Tier 2 (450K TPM) or add file size filter
Cannot be processed by GPT-4o at all. Needs file size filter to reject or chunking logic to split.

scenarios.investigation_note: 3-op SUCCESS = webhook + Drive download + GPT-4o/filter. Execution stops before Module 4 (Notion search). File has 184K chars (~46K tokens) - under 400K filter. Likely cause: toString(2.data) on Google Doc export returns unexpected data structure, OR GPT-4o returns zero output bundles. Need module-level execution detail from Make.com UI.
scenarios.notes: Router filters patched via API blueprint fallback. Module 6 create filter (not-exists), module 7 update filter (exists). Notion property mapping adjusted. Validation succeeded 2026-03-06. On 2026-03-07 oversized CVs caused 22 consecutive 429 failures (13:39-21:01), then 1 success (21:21 after tier upgrade), then 2 more failures on different oversized files. Deactivated to stop credit burn. Reactivated 2026-03-07T23:15. Two 3-op SUCCESS executions on 2026-03-08 - pipeline not completing full chain for Google Doc CVs.

apps_script_jobs.name: CV Auto-Sort
apps_script_jobs.mimetype_fix_note: Google Drive auto-converts uploaded .docx to Google Docs (mimeType: application/vnd.google-apps.document), stripping file extension. Script now checks both extension and mimeType.
apps_script_jobs.notes: Fully operational. Folder ID typo fixed, mimeType checking added and deployed for Google-converted files, processInbox() verified clean, 15-min trigger installed and confirmed in Triggers tab.

apps_script_jobs.name: Index Updater
apps_script_jobs.notes: Trigger manually created via Apps Script UI 2026-03-07. Day timer, 2am-3am, function runIndexUpdate, deployment Head, failure notify daily.

apps_script_jobs.name: Weekly Auto-Archive
apps_script_jobs.notes: Fully operational. Code deployed, weekly trigger installed (Sunday 3am-4am ET). Confirmed in Triggers tab.

next_actions: BLOCKER: Diagnose 3-op SUCCESS pattern. Check Make.com UI execution detail for 42eeb8e2 (00:18 UTC) to see which module halted the chain. Likely Module 3 filter rejection or GPT-4o empty output on Google Doc format.
If Module 3 filter: Investigate toString(2.data) behavior on Google Docs exported as text/plain. May need to change filter to use length(2.data) directly or adjust formatDocuments setting.
If GPT-4o empty output: Check if text/plain export produces valid content for the GPT-4o prompt or if additional extraction is needed.
Fix duplicate-detection reliability by adding candidate-name query filtering in module 4 Notion search.
Maintain weekly green/red audit using sync-manifest thresholds.
known_issues: Make UI visual editor intermittently fails with 'orphans' JavaScript error, blocking reliable manual router edits.
Module 4 Notion search currently lacks candidate-name query filtering and may return arbitrary records for duplicate detection.

Pipeline produces 3-op SUCCESS instead of 18-op full chain for Google Doc CVs (auto-converted from .docx). Execution stops after Module 2 or 3, before Notion search. File content is valid (184K chars, ~46K tokens). Root cause under investigation - likely Module 3 filter or GPT-4o output issue with Google Doc text export.

implementation_notes.filter_placement: filters belong on downstream route modules, not router object
execution_checkpoints: single-route gating confirmed with no duplicate-fire behavior
2026-03-08 00:18 - 3-op SUCCESS (42eeb8e2, 148KB, 1.46s) - Google Doc CV, pipeline incomplete
End-to-end chain test INCOMPLETE: Apps Script layer works (file moved), Make.com layer stops at 3 ops
